zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré於1120年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，他的父親Robert de Vitré27歲，母親Emma de La Guerche30歲。他於大約1155年與Emma de Dinan結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1173年11月11日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪曼其薩維尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré于1120年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，他的父亲Robert de Vitré27岁，母亲Emma de La Guerche30岁。他于大约1155年与Emma de Dinan结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1173年11月11日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪曼其薩維尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: III,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré was born in 1120, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Robert de Vitré, was 27 and his mother, Emma de La Guerche, was 30. He married Emma de Dinan about 1155. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 November 1173, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Savigny, Manche, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré est né en 1120, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Robert de Vitré, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emma de La Guerche, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Dinan environ 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1173, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Savigny, Manche, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré 1120 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vitré 27 und seine Mutter Emma de La Guerche 30. Er hat um 1155 Emma de Dinan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1173 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Savigny, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré è nato il nel 1120 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Vitré, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Emma de La Guerche, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Dinan circa 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1173, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Savigny, Manche, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitréが1120年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父Robert de Vitréは27歳，母Emma de La Guercheは30歳であった。約1155年にEmma de Dinanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1173年11月11日に故郷で53歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディマンチェサヴィグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré(이)가 1120년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vitré(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de La Guerche(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1155년 Emma de Dinan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1173년 11월 11일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 서아비그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré nasceu em 1120, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Robert de Vitré, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Emma de La Guerche, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Dinan aproximadamente 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1173, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Savigny, Manche, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré родился в 1120 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Vitré было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de La Guerche, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Dinan около 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 ноября 1173 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности савигни, манч, норманди, Франция.

sm.from 1152 to 1170: mai le 1152 e o'o I le 1170

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré nació en 1120, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Robert de Vitré, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Emma de La Guerche, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Emma de Dinan aproximadamente 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1173, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Savigny, Manche, Normandie, Francia.
